speaker: Seeker
text: Main chupchap sunta raha jab Boss ne team ke saamne bola ki JEE dropout ki yahi auqat hai. Palat ke bolne ka option hi nahi tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational frame mein Lens C use karke helpless social situation mirror karna.
text: Us moment mein tum bilkul aise phase mein the jahan chup rehna hi tumhe possible laga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bas chupchap sunta raha. Gaon mein fasal barbaad hai, Papa loan ki kist nahi bhar pa rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared family fallout ko softly mirror karna.
text: Tumhara darr sirf office ka nahi, ghar ki poori zimmedari hil jaane ka bhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, agar maine jawab diya hota toh bolte badtameez hai, aur Papa ki izzat mitti mein mil jaati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad ek focused sawal se deepest sting identify karna.
text: Us scene ka sabse chubhne wala hissa kya tha - 'dropout' bolna, team ke saamne bolna, ya ghar ka thought?

speaker: Seeker
text: Team ke saamne bolna sabse zyada laga, par fir bhi chupchap sunta raha. Ghar ka sahara tootne ka darr heavy tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm line + Lens D se repeated humiliation-memory loop mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Wahi scene baar baar wapas aa raha hai aur tumhe andar se daba raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bas ghar ka sahara bachaana chahta hoon. Apni feeling side pe rakh di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relation-duty burden mirror karna without escalating.
text: Tum apni awaaz daba kar parivaar ka sahara banne ki koshish kar rahe ho, aur woh bahut bhari lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Core conflict yeh hai ki bahar se sambhal raha hoon, par andar se toot gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lagta hai format mein helplessness aur internal collapse reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut helpless feel kar rahe ho, jaise chup rehte rehते andar ki jagah bhar gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar main bolu toh log kahenge badtameez hai. Isi darr se main chup rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement only and soft pause.
text: Badtameez ka tag lagne ka darr tumhe bandh kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, isi liye phir bhi chupchap sunta raha. Baad mein akela ro leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Employment+rural debt reality normalize karna aur worth outcome se alag karna.
text: Fasal nuksan, loan pressure, aur job insecurity ke beech aisa टूटना bilkul natural hai. Tumhari keemat kisi boss ke taanon se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga, par aage ka pehla step अभी भी unclear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote from same world to reduce isolation.
text: Gaon se city jobs mein aaye kaafi log yahi pattern bolte hain - beizzati seh kar bhi ghar bachane ka load; sirf tumhara nahi, par koi openly maanta nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye chhote steps chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 low-load options देना.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing 4-in 6-out; (2) ek kagaz par sirf loan kist + salary date likho; (3) trusted aadmi ko 2-line message: 'pressure heavy hai, kal 10 min baat chahiye'. Jo easiest लगे, pehle woh karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karunga, saans heavy hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana once.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders dheele karo. Phir 4 count inhale, 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir bolo: 'abhi ek kadam kaafi hai'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad pressure halka hai. Dimag clearer lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe: public shaming is control behavior, not worth metric.
text: Public taunts aksar control dikhane ka tareeka hote hain, tumhari asli kabilayat ka sach nahi. Is framing se shame ka load dheere kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ko update dena abhi bhi tough lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: 2 concise scripts देना to preserve dignity and reduce overload.
text: Do short lines rakho: (1) 'Office pressure high hai, par main sambhal raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam call pakki.' Isse sach bhi rahega aur load bhi manageable रहेगा.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short lines se control milta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relation-preserving approach mirror karna.
text: Tum shanti bachate hue bhi khud ko sambhalne ki jagah bana rahe ho, yeh balanced tareeka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat mein phir darr aata hai ki kal phir zillat hui toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E se anticipated humiliation fear mirror.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, neend टूटती hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night dip normalize and reinforce dignity.
text: Aise phase mein broken sleep aur fatigue common response hai, weakness nahi. Tumhara dignity bachate hue step lena bhi bahut important progress hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal ab thoda clearer lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter

strategy_intent: Two concise scripts for preserving dignity and calm.
text: Do short lines use karo: (1) 'Office pressure high hai, par main handle kar raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam call pakki.' Isse clarity bhi rahegi aur panic bhi kam रहेगा.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short line se control milta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relationship-preserving pacing mirror karna.
text: Tum rishton ki maryada bachate hue bhi khud ko sambhalne ka raasta bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko darr aata hai ki kal fir se sabke saamne zaleel hua toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E anticipated humiliation fear mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari hua. Raat mein kal ki zillat ka darr bada lagta hai, isliye neend toot jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, neend टूटती hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night dip normalize and validate endurance effort.
text: Aise phase mein broken sleep aur fatigue common response hai, weakness ka sign nahi. Tumhare lagatar small steps meaningful progress hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal ab thoda clearer lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state pe concise 3-block plan देना.
text: Kal ka short flow: 5 min breathing, 20 min focused task block, 10 min remittance note update. Teen blocks enough hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dil pehle se halka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe about gradual recovery.
text: Remittance burden aur job-shame se recovery gradual hoti hai; consistent small steps hi long-term stability banate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lagta hai sambhal lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ki steadiness ko kal continuity se link karna.
text: Aaj ka yeh steady rhythm kal repeat hua toh heavy wave dheere dheere chhoti padti jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close pe two tiny continuation steps without burden.
text: Sone se pehle 6 dhimi saans lo aur kal ke 3 block notes mein tick-box likh do. Bas itna hi, aaj ka kaam poora.

speaker: Seeker
text: Office mein zubaan nahi kholi, meeting mein boss ne itna zaleel kiya phir bhi chup raha. Hostel aa ke ro pada.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational helplessness ko Lens C se mirror karna.
text: Tumne saamne chup rehkar sab absorb kiya, aur asli dard tumhe akela milke bahar aaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chupchap gulamiyat kar raha hoon. Papa ne loan leke shehar bheja tha, ab fasal barbaad ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared family collapse and naak concern mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai agar yahan takraav hua toh ghar ki naak aur sahara dono khatre mein aa jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, main kalesh nahi kar sakta. Ghar ki shanti bachani hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad sharpest trigger identify karna.
text: Sabse zyada kya chubhta hai - public zaleel hona, ghar ki naak ka darr, ya Papa ka loan yaad aana?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ki naak ka darr sabse heavy hai. Isliye zaleel hokar bhi chup rehna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk warm line + Lens D se repeat suppression cycle mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Har incident mein tum wahi cycle jee rahe ho - saamne chup, baad mein tootna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bol nahi sakta kyunki uska nuksan ghar ko hoga. Main bas seh raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relation-preserving compulsion mirror karna.
text: Tum apni awaaz daba kar ghar ki shanti aur parivaar ki naak dono ko bachaane ki koshish kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Core conflict yeh hai ki main andar se phas gaya hoon. Na chup rehna chhod sakta hoon na bol sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational_Preservation mapping se trapped/helpless emotion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut helpless feel kar rahe ho, jaise har raasta tumse kuch na kuch chhin leta ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar jawab diya toh log kahenge shehar jaake bigad gaya. Isliye muh bandh rakhta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement only.
text: Bigad gaya ka label tumhe aur chup rehne pe dhakel raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, isliye office mein zubaan nahi kholi aur hostel aake ro diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Family-loan + crop loss + job humiliation reality normalize and worth separate.
text: Loan pressure, fasal nuksan, aur office humiliation ke beech aisa टूटना bilkul samajhne layak hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek meeting ki zillat se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka hai par aage ka pehla step अभी भी unclear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote from similar world to reduce isolation.
text: Shehar mein family-loan carry karne wale kaafi young earners yahi bolte hain - saamne chup rehna, baad mein tootna; sirf tumhara nahi, par log ghar ki shanti ke liye bolte nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye chhote practical steps chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal pe 3 low-load options dena.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing 4-in 6-out; (2) note mein sirf loan due + salary date likho; (3) trusted dost ko 2-line message: 'pressure heavy hai, kal 10 min baat chahiye'. Jo easiest लगे pehle woh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karunga, saans heavy hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion step-by-step execute karwana once.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders dheele karo. Phir 4 count inhale aur 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir bolo: 'abhi ek kadam kaafi hai'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad pressure halka hai. Dimag clearer feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe: public humiliation reflects power misuse, not worth.
text: Public zillat aksar power misuse hota hai, tumhari asli keemat ka sach nahi. Is framing se shame ka load dheere kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ko update dena abhi bhi tough lag रहा है.
